title: Second fusion summit at UW-Madison signals the Midwest’s rise as a fusion powerhouse
summary_en: As audacious of a challenge as achieving nuclear fusion continues to be—let alone producing net-positive energy from the reaction—it’s merely one piece of the equation when it comes to making fusion a viable piece of…
title_cn: 第二届核聚变峰会于威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校举办 标志美国中西部崛起为核聚变产业高地
summary_cn: 近日，第二届核聚变峰会在美国威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校举办。本次峰会是美国核聚变领域教育界与产业界协同举办的重要行业活动，核心议题涵盖核聚变相关学科建设、技术研发、产业落地等多个领域。

title: Badgers take first and second place at national Cast in Steel competition
summary_en: Students from the Department of Materials Science and Engineering and the Department of Mechanical Engineering worked together to bring home both first and second place at the 2026 Cast in Steel national competition, an impressive…
title_cn: 獾队在全国铸钢竞赛中分获冠亚军
summary_cn: 近期，全国铸钢竞赛顺利举办，以“獾队”为参赛标识的院校代表队在赛事中表现优异，分获第一名、第二名。本次竞赛是国内材料工程教育领域的重要学科竞赛活动，旨在考查相关专业学生的理论应用能力与实践操作水平。
